_note: Per-voxel protein population for the hepatocyte. Real per-cell copy numbers (order-of-magnitude; see docs/12-hepatocyte-quantitative.md) seeded into their correct compartment voxels. Positions are normalised cell coordinates in [-1,1]; counts are populations, not atoms. Geometry (membrane split by x-sign, ~20% hashed mitochondrial fraction) is schematic; the copy numbers and compartment assignments are grounded.
